title: Dracula
creator: Bram Stoker
license: Public domain (text: Project Gutenberg #345 / audio: LibriVox)
description: Epistolary horror novel told through diaries, letters, and telegrams. Multi-narrator structure — Jonathan Harker, Mina Harker, Dr. Seward, Lucy Westenra, Van Helsing — makes it ideal for showcasing per-speaker visuals.
